question: Did we receive payment from Cameron Abbott partnership This year?
generated_sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM master_txn_table
    JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
    WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Cameron Abbott Partnership'
      AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE >= DATE('now','-1 year')
      AND master_txn_table.AR_paid = 'Yes'
);
gold_sql: select transaction_id from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'payment' and customers = "Cameron Abbott" and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date)

question: What our monthly spend on Jessica Baker
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Jessica Baker'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-01-31';
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Jessica Baker" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')

question: Did we receive payment from Joseph Moreno partnership in q3 last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM master_txn_table
    JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
    WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Joseph Moreno partnership'
      AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN '2022-07-01' AND '2022-09-30'
      AND master_txn_table.AR_paid = 'Yes'
);
gold_sql: select transaction_id from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'payment' and customers = "Joseph Moreno" and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+6 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+9 month', '-1 day')

question: What acount had our biggest expense in q2 this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT chart_of_accounts.Account_name, SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.Account = chart_of_accounts.Account_name
WHERE master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN '2023-04-01' AND '2023-06-30'
GROUP BY chart_of_accounts.Account_name
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year','+3 month') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+6 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1

question: Did we receive payment from Stephen Harris partnership today?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM master_txn_table 
            JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
            WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Stephen Harris Partnership' 
              AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE = CURRENT_DATE 
              AND master_txn_table.AR_paid = 'Yes'
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS received_payment
gold_sql: select transaction_id from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'payment' and customers = "Stephen Harris" and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date) AND date(current_date)

question: What was the last bill Samuel Cross received from Dale Hudson?
generated_sql:
SELECT mt.Transaction_DATE, mt.Amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN employees e ON mt.businessID = e.businessID
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Samuel Cross' AND e.Employee_name = 'Dale Hudson'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select max(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Samuel Cross" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Dale Hudson"

question: How many Memberships did we sell to Leah Bartlett This quarter?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM master_txn_table

    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Amount) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN '2022-07-01' AND '2022-09-30'
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+6 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+9 month', '-1 day')  group by customers

question: When was the last time we sold Club
generated_sql:
SELECT MAX(master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS Last_Sale_Date
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service
WHERE products.Product_Service = 'Club';
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "Club " order by transaction_date desc limit 1

question: What acount had our biggest expense Last fiscal year?
generated_sql:
SELECT chart_of_accounts.Account_name, SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.Account = chart_of_accounts.Account_name
WHERE master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'
GROUP BY chart_of_accounts.Account_name
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1

question: How many Photography did we sell to Kevin Valdez This fiscal year to date?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Kevin Valdez' 
  AND products.Product_Service_type = 'Photography' 
  AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE >= DATE('now','-1 year');
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Kevin Valdez" and product_service = 'Photography' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','+1 year', '+3 months', '-1 day')
